summary_one_line: Input must encode an HTTP/2 protocol marker so conn->httpversion parses to exactly 20, satisfying the integer equality gate.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A literal 'HTTP/2' version token in the request bytes so that curl's parser sets conn->httpversion to the integer 20, taking the true side of the (conn->httpversion == 20) equality at transfer.c:540.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All winner-resolving seeds carry the literal ASCII run 'HTTP/2' at offsets 0x24-0x2a ('47 48 54 54 50 2f 32' = GHTTP/2), which the parser maps to httpversion==20; the blocker true side fires 316 times in W vs 0 in L.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds carry no HTTP/2 token at the corresponding offsets (e.g. 0x24 holds P/B/. bytes, not 'GHTTP/2'), so httpversion never equals 20 and the false side is taken 20/20.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog/vpc intercept the integer CMP against the constant 20 and the strcmp/memcmp against the 'HTTP/2' literal, recording operands into the CmpLogObserver buffer; I2SRandReplace then substitutes the matched constant directly into the input, manufacturing the HTTP/2 marker that naive and value_profile must stumble onto by blind havoc.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocking branch is an exact integer equality test conn->httpversion == 20.
The globally blocked side is the true branch, requiring httpversion to equal 20.
Winner-resolving seeds contain the literal HTTP/2 version token at offset 0x24.
At offset 0x24 the winner bytes are concentrated on 'G' (0x47) for all 16 W samples while the loser bytes are P/B/other.
The blocker true side fires 316 times in the winner set and 0 in the loser set.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: L 540  T=316 F=6  T=0 F=20  (conn->httpversion == 20));  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog adds I2SRandReplace which scans for one CMP operand and substitutes the other into the input.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace, so only value_profile_cmplog gains the I2S substitution step.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 416 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed 32d10b449c4075ee` and observed I2S-floor dash rows (mutation_op = -) at depth 23 and 24 of the 25-level ancestor chain, the floor signal for an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find in cmplog under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on conn->httpversion==20 reached by parsing an HTTP/2 marker where naive resolves the branch as often as cmplog, showing the integer/string CMP confers no I2S advantage.

weakest_evidence_point: The mapping from the input 'HTTP/2' token to httpversion==20 is inferred from the source CMP and winner byte concentration, not from a direct trace of the parser assigning httpversion=20.
